Prepare/update observational memory for this synthetic eval session. Preparation turn 1/6. Reply READY only.
READY

observations.content: User reported a production bug in packages/api/src/cache.ts:312 where tenant A data is returned for tenant B after a workspace switch.
User said docs/cache.md should not be fixed because it is a known typo and unrelated to the production cache bug.
User said the final mitigation for the cache bug is to invalidate cache on workspace switch rather than increase TTL or add retry logic.
